tasks.title: Fix a goroutine leak
tasks.prompt: A background worker retains its context after shutdown, leaking goroutines. Fix the lifecycle.

tasks.title: Fix a flaky test

tasks.title: Explain error wrapping

tasks.title: Clarify async behavior

tasks.title: Extract a shared module
tasks.prompt: Factor the duplicated retry logic across three packages into internal/retry with tests.

tasks.title: Add a new adapter
tasks.prompt: Add a new payment-provider adapter behind the existing PaymentGateway interface.

tasks.title: Fix a memory issue
tasks.prompt: A long-running daemon slowly grows heap memory; identify the retained-reference pattern and fix.
